title: angelica razulii
intro: Angelica razulii, also known as Wild Angelica, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, and its essential oil has been used to treat skin conditions like acne and eczema. Angelica razulii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or tincture, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies and wellness practices.
